debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
n k : ℕ
hn : n ≠ 0
hk : k ≠ 0
ε δ : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hδ : δ > 0
hunif : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε
hfine : 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ
⊢ (b - a) / ↑(n * k) * ∑ j ∈ Finset.range n, ∑ k_1 ∈ Finset.range k, f (a + (↑(j + k_1 * n) + 1) * (b - a) / ↑(n * k)) -
      (b - a) / ↑n * ∑ i ∈ Finset.range n, f (a + (↑i + 1) * (b - a) / ↑n) =
    (b - a) / ↑n *
      ∑ j ∈ Finset.range n,
        (1 / ↑k * ∑ ℓ ∈ Finset.range k, f (a + (↑ℓ + ↑j * ↑k + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k)) -
          f (a + (↑j + 1) * (b - a) / ↑n))

failed_attempts:
have h_double_sum : ∑ j ∈ Finset.range n, ∑ k_1 ∈ Finset.range k, f (a + ((j + k_1 * n) + 1) * (b - a) / (n * k)) = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (n * k), f (a + ((i : ℝ) + 1) * (b - a) / (n * k)) := by
    rw [ sum_of_prod ]
    norm_cast
  have h_double_sum2 : ∑ j ∈ Finset.range n, ∑ k_1 ∈ Finset.range k, f (a + ((k_1 + j * k) + 1) * (b - a) / (n * k)) = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range (n * k), f (a + ((i : ℝ) + 1) * (b - a) / (n * k)) := by
    rw [ ← Finset.sum_product' ]
    refine' Finset.sum_bij ( fun x hx => x.1 * k + x.2 ) _ _ _ _ <;> simp +decide [ Finset.mem_product, Finset.mem_range ] at *
    · exact fun a b ha hb => by nlinarith
    · intro a b ha hb c d hc hd h; have := congr_arg ( · % k ) h; norm_num [ Nat.add_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt hb, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt hd ] at this; aesop
    · exact fun b hb => ⟨ b / k, b % k, ⟨ Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul <| by linarith, Nat.mod_lt _ <| Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk ⟩, by rw [ Nat.div_add_mod' ] ⟩
    · exact fun _ _ _ _ => by ring
  simp_all +decide [ mul_sub, Finset.mul_sum _ _ _, div_eq_mul_inv ]
  simp_all +decide [ mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, Finset.mul_sum _ _ _, Finset.sum_mul ]
  simp_all +decide [ ← Finset.mul_sum _ _ _, ← Finset.sum_mul ]
